sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70905" key="no/ar" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νόαρ</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">νοέω</etym>) <sense id="n70905.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">phantasm, spectre,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theognost.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Can.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">80</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
